common.comingSoonDescription: This module is under construction and will be available in a future release.

drawer.title: Theme Settings
drawer.description: Adjust the appearance and layout to suit your preferences.
drawer.resetAllAria: Reset all settings to default values
drawer.themeDescription: Choose between system preference, light mode, or dark mode
drawer.themeModeAria: Select light, dark, or system appearance
drawer.colorPaletteDescription: Choose brand colors for light and dark mode
drawer.sidebarDescription: Choose between inset, floating, or standard sidebar layout
drawer.layoutDescription: Choose between default expanded, compact icon-only, or full layout mode
drawer.directionDescription: Choose between left-to-right or right-to-left site direction
drawer.languageDescription: Choose English or Simplified Chinese for the UI

appearance.interfaceLanguageHint: Language for navigation, settings, and other UI text.
appearance.colorPaletteHint: Brand colors; light/dark still use the options below or system.
appearance.fontHint: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
appearance.themeHint: Select the theme for the dashboard.

auth.signInDescription: Use the account assigned by your administrator.
auth.signOutDescription: You will need to sign in again to access the console.
auth.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Check your username and password.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dataDictionary.title: Data dictionary
dataDictionary.subtitle: Maintain business dropdowns and coding standards; each type maps to its own dictionary table.
dataDictionary.empty: No entries yet. Use the button at the top right to create one.
dataDictionary.loadError: Failed to load dictionary data. Check the network or backend service.
dataDictionary.createDescription: New entries are sent to the backend and persisted. The list refreshes after a successful save.
dataDictionary.editDescription: Codes cannot be changed. Saving updates the record in the database.
dataDictionary.saveFailed: Save failed. Check field values or whether the code conflicts.
dataDictionary.deleteFailed: Delete failed. The entry may be missing or still referenced.
dataDictionary.deleteWarning: Business modules referencing this value may break. Confirm there are no foreign-key dependencies.

device-types.title: Device type codes
device-types.description: Controlled equipment classification codes used by energy assets and device trees.

energy-types.title: Energy type values
energy-types.description: Basis for consumption breakdown and carbon accounting; align metering media and point dimensions.

fault-codes.title: Fault code catalog
fault-codes.description: Standard codes, descriptions, severity levels, and recommended actions.

alarm-levels.title: Alarm level values
alarm-levels.description: Display colors, notification policies, and SLA handling times.

spaces.title: Area / space codes
spaces.description: Building location coding aligned with metering install codes and asset location fields.

placeholders.slaHours: Leave empty for no SLA; 0 means immediate

validation.slaInvalid: SLA must be a non-negative number or empty for no limit
validation.sortOrderInvalid: Sort order must be a positive integer

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Maintain the department tree; add child units and edit node details.
organizations.empty: No organizations yet. Use the button at the top right to create one.
organizations.loadError: Failed to load organizations. Check the network or backend service.
organizations.saveFailed: Save failed. Please try again later.
organizations.selectHint: Select an organization on the left to view or edit details.
organizations.detailDescription: Code cannot be changed after creation; materialized path is generated from the tree.
organizations.createDescription: Choose a parent and enter code and name; the materialized path is generated automatically.
organizations.deleteWarning: Child organizations and linked users cannot be attached after deletion.

validation.codeFormat: Code must use uppercase letters, digits, and underscores, and start with a letter.

errors.CODE_FORMAT: Code must use uppercase letters, digits, and underscores, and start with a letter.
errors.ROOT_NOT_DELETABLE: The root organization cannot be deleted.
errors.HAS_CHILDREN: Remove or move child organizations first.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Maintain RBAC roles and data-scope rules. Permission element configuration will be added later.
roles.empty: No roles yet. Use the button at the top right to create one.
roles.createDescription: Role permission configuration will be available in a future release.
roles.createFormDescription: Enter basic role information and data scope. Permission elements will be configurable in a later release.
roles.loadError: Failed to load roles. Check the network or backend service.
roles.saveFailed: Save failed. Check field values or whether the code conflicts.
roles.editDescription: Role code cannot be changed. Permission elements will be configurable in a later release.
roles.builtInNotDeletable: Built-in system roles cannot be deleted
roles.assignedUsers: Users are still assigned to this role. Remove assignments first.
roles.deleteWarning: Users assigned this role will lose the associated permissions.

validation.codeFormat: Code must be uppercase letters, digits, or underscores, starting with a letter

SYS_ADMIN.name: System administrator
SYS_ADMIN.description: Full platform configuration, users, permissions, and system integration.

BIZ_OP.name: Business operator
BIZ_OP.description: Day-to-day operations on assets, metering, energy/carbon data, and monitoring.

QUERY.name: Read-only user
QUERY.description: Read-only access to cockpit, reports, and monitoring; cannot change master data.

AUDITOR.name: Auditor
AUDITOR.description: Audit logs, report export, and compliance review without business write access.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Manage system accounts, departments, and role assignments.
users.empty: No users yet. Click Add user to create one.
users.loadError: Failed to load users. Check the network or backend service.
users.saveFailed: Save failed. Check the fields and try again.
users.adminNotDeletable: Built-in admin account cannot be deleted
users.adminRoleRequired: Admin account must keep the system admin role
users.addDescription: Fill in user details and assign roles, then save.
users.editDescription: Update user details or reset password, then save.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{username}}?

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage account preferences and interface language.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: This is how others will see you on the site.
profile.usernameHint: Your public display name. It can be your real name or a pseudonym. You can only change this once every 30 days.
profile.emailPlaceholder: Select a verified email to display
profile.emailHint: You can manage verified email addresses in your
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
profile.bioHint: You can @mention other users and organizations.
profile.urlsHint: Add links to your website, blog, or social media profiles.

validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters.
validation.usernameMax: Username must not be longer than 30 characters.
validation.emailRequired: Please select an email to display.
validation.bioMin: Bio must be at least 4 characters.
validation.bioMax: Bio must not be longer than 160 characters.

account.title: Account
account.desc: Change your login password and set your preferred interface language.
account.passwordSectionHint: Verify your current password, then set a new one.
account.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.
account.languageHint: Language used for navigation, menus, and settings.

validation.passwordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.passwordSame: New password must be different from the current password.

appearancePage.title: Appearance
appearancePage.desc: Customize the appearance of the app. Switch between light and dark themes.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.communicationHint: Receive emails about your account activity.
notifications.marketingHint: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notifications.socialHint: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
notifications.securityHint: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
notifications.mobile: Use different settings for my mobile devices
notifications.mobileHint: You can manage your mobile notifications in the

display.title: Display
display.desc: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.
display.sidebarHint: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.

validation.itemsMin: You have to select at least one item.
